title: US lawmaker asks Sarah Ferguson to testify over 'close Epstein ties'
description: The letter, seen by the BBC, also called on Ferguson to share any knowledge about Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's links to Epstein.
content:
A US lawmaker has made a direct plea to Sarah Ferguson to testify about her "close personal and business ties" to Jeffrey Epstein, according to a letter seen exclusively by the BBC.

title: Czech Republic v Republic of Ireland: Hallgrimsson feels the 'pain' in shootout loss
description: "Pain" is the overriding emotion for Republic of Ireland manager Heimir Hallgrimsson as his side's World Cup dream ends on penalties in Prague.
content:
After 120 minutes and a penalty shootout, the Republic of Ireland's World Cup dream came to a crushing end in Prague with "pain" the overriding emotion for manager Heimir Hallgrimsson.

title: 'My son will never be the same again after sexual abuse by a friend'
description: In the past two years at least 186 young people have been referred to health trusts here after exhibiting harmful sexualised behaviours.
content:
The mother of a boy who was sexually abused by another child has said his life will "never be the same again".

title: Under fives should have no more than an hour a day of screen time, under new UK advice
description: Keir Starmer promises help for parents in limiting children’s online activity as government issues guidance to families
content:
Children under five should spend no more than an hour a day on screens, new government advice says.
Screen time for children under two should be avoided except for shared activities encouraging interaction, families are advised.

title: Trump's signature to appear on US bank notes in first for sitting president
description: The US president's signature will appear on new paper currency alongside Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
content:
Donald Trump is set to become the first sitting US president to have his signature on US banknotes, the Treasury Department has announced.
